objective: Close only the practice-answer atomicity partition of F-0027 by making attempt limits, answer insertion, practice progress and wrong-answer mistake_book mutation one authoritative transaction command; keep mock submit/scoring finalization as a separate residual.
blockedFiles: all provider, secret/env, deployment and historical evidence/audit files

preRedImpactScan.authoritativeChain: practice answer route and validator -> practice service -> PracticeRepository command contract -> student-flow runtime repository transaction -> answer_record/practice/mistake_book schema and migration -> direct tests, mocks and F-0008/F-0026 regressions
preRedImpactScan.bundleDisposition: F-0027 is partitioned: this task covers practice answer atomicity only; mock submit/scoring finalization remains a separate independently accepted residual; F-0013 remains runtime_hold.
preRedImpactScan.currentMasterEvidence: practice service performs answer existence/count reads before three separate repository writes; the repository has no shared transaction or attempt constraint and mistake_book uses a read-then-update/insert sequence without user-question uniqueness
preRedImpactScan.permissionSemantics: unchanged; every command must revalidate the exact F-0008 authorization lineage under the existing serialization boundary

practiceAnswerAtomicCommandContract.attemptInvariant: objective questions allow exactly one persisted attempt and subjective questions allow at most two; the database stores legacy-nullable attempt number and max-attempt facts and rejects partial or impossible combinations
practiceAnswerAtomicCommandContract.transaction: one authoritative repository transaction revalidates the owned active practice and exact authorization lineage, locks the practice/question command boundary, reads all attempts, inserts one answer, updates practice.last_answered_at and atomically upserts mistake_book for a wrong objective answer
practiceAnswerAtomicCommandContract.concurrency: concurrent objective submissions yield one committed answer; concurrent subjective submissions cannot exceed two; corruption or ambiguous history fails closed with zero partial writes
practiceAnswerAtomicCommandContract.mistakeBook: one row per user and question; a wrong answer atomically increments wrong_count and refreshes the latest snapshot without lost updates
practiceAnswerAtomicCommandContract.legacy: legacy answer rows remain readable but are never guessed or backfilled; ambiguous legacy attempt history fails closed
practiceAnswerAtomicCommandContract.authorization: the client supplies no authorization fact beyond the already validated context; another source covering the same scope cannot replace the captured lineage
practiceAnswerAtomicCommandContract.findingDisposition: F-0027 remains open_partitioned after this task because mock submit/scoring finalization atomicity is not implemented here

validationCommands.name: practice-answer-atomic-command-state-parse
arguments: strictly parses the F-0027 practice partition contract and WIP state

validationCommands.name: practice-answer-atomic-command-schema-source
arguments: allows only the additive practice-attempt and mistake-book uniqueness migration

requestedOperations: additive schema and migration source without apply
database application transaction and concurrency logic

conclusions: authorization serialization precedes the owned active practice row lock and practice-question attempt lock
all attempt rows are read under the transaction lock and corrupt identity, partial legacy, mixed legacy-numbered, duplicate or non-contiguous history fails closed
prepared objective and subjective facts are checked before insert and a wrong objective answer requires the same-transaction mistake_book upsert
answer insert, monotonic practice progress update and atomic wrong_count increment share one rollback boundary
favorite and wrong-answer races preserve is_favorite, wrong_count, latest wrong facts and existing source merge semantics
migration source is additive and no migration or real database execution occurred
adversarialReview.residual: mock_exam submit and scoring finalization atomicity remains a separate F-0027 partition
